jsonLd.title: Principal Investment Banker at MobiKwik
jsonLd.description:
We at MobiKwik are looking for an experienced Investment Banker based out of Jodhpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About MobiKwik:
MobiKwik is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MobiKwik!
